overall.description: A bus driving simulation game depicting a first-person view from the driver's cabin during a heavy rainstorm. The bus navigates wet European city streets, stopping at designated bus stops to pick up passengers while windshield wipers actively clear the rain from the glass.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered bus stop on residential street

events.description: front bus doors open to allow passenger boarding
passenger boards the bus and moves inside

agents.ego_description: stationary at bus stop with doors open, allowing passenger to board

notable_agents.action: waiting at the bus stop door and then boarding the vehicle

entered.detail: glass and metal bus shelter with a bench visible on the sidewalk
multi-story concrete residential building with balconies
red brick apartment building with multiple windows

segments.scene_description: The bus is stationary at a covered bus stop during heavy rain. The windshield wipers move continuously as a passenger boards through the front door. Apartment buildings line both sides of the residential street.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet city street with parked vehicles

events.description: bus accelerates from stationary position and departs the stop
bus makes a right turn at the intersection

agents.ego_description: driving down the rain-soaked street with active windshield wipers, navigating through an intersection

entered.detail: row of parked vehicles including a red car and white sedan along the curb
zebra crossing markings visible on the wet asphalt road surface

segments.scene_description: The bus pulls away from the stop and drives along a tree-lined residential street. Parked cars line the right side of the road as the vehicle approaches and navigates a right turn at an intersection with a crosswalk.

events.description: bus approaches the next bus stop with a waiting passenger visible
bus slows down and comes to a complete stop at the bus stop

agents.ego_description: approaching the next bus stop while reducing speed, preparing to service the waiting passenger

notable_agents.action: standing under the bus shelter waiting to board

entered.detail: bus stop shelter with glass panels and a metal roof on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The bus continues down the street lined with trees and parked cars, approaching the next bus stop. A pedestrian is visible waiting under the shelter as the vehicle slows to a stop.

scene_state.functional_zone: bus stop with passenger boarding area

events.description: bus doors open to allow the waiting passenger to board
bus departs from the stop and accelerates into traffic

agents.ego_description: stopped at the bus stop with doors open for passenger boarding, then closing doors and departing

notable_agents.action: boarding the bus through the front door with a bag

segments.scene_description: The bus is stopped at the bus stop with the shelter now close on the right. The doors open to admit a passenger, then close after boarding is complete. The bus then pulls away from the curb.

events.description: bus passes construction zone with red and white striped barriers on the right
bus approaches intersection with traffic lights and oncoming vehicle

agents.ego_description: driving along the street passing a construction zone with barriers on the right side

notable_agents.action: oncoming car with headlights illuminated approaching in the rain

entered.detail: red and white striped plastic construction barriers lining the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The bus drives past a construction zone marked by red and white barriers on the right. The street continues with trees and buildings as the vehicle approaches another intersection with an oncoming car visible through the rain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a bus cabin as it navigates a rain-slicked residential neighborhood through a series of stops. It begins stationary at a covered bus stop where windshield wipers clear heavy rain while a passenger boards amidst a backdrop of apartment buildings. As the bus pulls away, the camera moves along a tree-lined street past parked cars before navigating a right turn at a crosswalk. The scene then shifts as the vehicle slows to a stop at a second shelter to admit another passenger, before pulling back into the flow of traffic. Finally, the bus drives past red and white construction barriers and approaches another intersection, with an oncoming car appearing through the persistent downpour.
